label: tool_envelope • execution_error is the catch-all and defaults retryable
notes: Pins `execution_error` — the catch-all for thrown runtime failures (process exit, transient IO) — defaulting to retryable=true. Complements the terminal kinds (rejected/tool_not_found/user_denied/not_found) so the retryable default table is locked on BOTH sides.

toolEnvelope.message: The command exited with a non-zero status.
